title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH - 211info
text: ADVENTIST HEALTH PRIMARY CARE BROOTEN ROAD BEHAVIORAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental or behavioral health services, which may include mental health evaluations, individual, couples, and family counseling, domestic violence counseling, and substance use disorder counseling. 38505 Brooten Road Suite A Pacific City, OR 97135 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm (503) 815-2292 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 815-2292 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Tillamook County Services: Bereavement and Grief Counseling Conjoint Counseling Family Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Spouse/Intimate Partner Abuse Counseling Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - PRIMARY CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ADVENTIST HEALTH PRIMARY CARE BROOTEN ROAD
